ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Chris Barnett, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MTB INVESTMENTS LLC, A TEXAS LIABILITY COMPANY.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION and MICHAEL F. DENNY, individually.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $134,247.98
Pre-Judgment Interest: $14,253.49
Attorney's Fees: $2,165.00
Costs: $550.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $151,216.47
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Aaron Dawson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MTB INVESTMENTS, LLC, a Texas Limited Liability Company.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC., a California corporation; MICHEL F. DENNY, individually.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $134,247.98
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7.25%: $14,253.49
Attorney's Fees: $15,375.00 (Court will rule on this item at the next hearing date after submission of declaration re: attorney's fees)
Costs: $550.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $164,426.47
Court ordered matter continued to 5/29/2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514, for counsel to submit and file detailed declaration re: attorney's fees at least 10 days before hearing with courtesy copies delivered directly to the court and proposed judgment.
